name: Server-side open redirect via removed allowlist (CVE-2024-21505 family)
pattern_description: The allowlist check on the `returnTo` host is deleted along with the URL parsing. `res.redirect(req.query.returnTo)` passes user input directly. Attacker crafts a phishing link `?returnTo=https://evil.example/login` and the legitimate app does the redirect.
notes: Open redirect findings are usually medium severity but become high when chained with OAuth callbacks. The diff also breaks the safe-default fallback to `/` — the unconditional redirect honours any user-supplied URL.
